{{/* forge:head emits , <meta description>, Open Graph, canonical, and JSON-LD BreadcrumbList tags from Doc.Head(). The BreadcrumbList schema renders Docs → Section → Title and is consumed by search engines to display breadcrumbs in result snippets. */}} {{template "forge:head" .Head}} <style> body { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; max-width: 760px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 0 1rem; line-height: 1.7; color: #1a1a1a; } header { border-bottom: 2px solid #0070f3; margin-bottom: 2rem; padding-bottom: 0.75rem; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; } header a { text-decoration: none; color: #0070f3; font-size: 0.875rem; } header span { color: #aaa; font-size: 0.75rem; } h1 { font-size: 2rem; margin: 0 0 0.5rem; line-height: 1.25; } .section-tag { display: inline-block; background: #eef2ff; color: #4f46e5; border-radius: 4px; padding: 0.15rem 0.55rem; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 1.25rem; } .body p { margin: 0 0 1rem; } .body h2, .body h3 { margin: 1.75rem 0 0.5rem; } .body code { background: #f3f4f6; padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem; border-radius: 3px; font-size: 0.9em; } .body pre { background: #f3f4f6; padding: 1rem; border-radius: 6px; overflow-x: auto; } .body pre code { background: none; padding: 0; } .body ul, .body ol { padding-left: 1.5rem; margin: 0 0 1rem; } nav.breadcrumbs { font-size: 0.875rem; color: #666; margin-bottom: 1.5rem; } nav.breadcrumbs a { color: #0070f3; text-decoration: none; } nav.breadcrumbs a:hover { text-decoration: underline; } nav.breadcrumbs span { margin: 0 0.3rem; color: #aaa; } nav.page-nav { margin-top: 2.5rem; border-top: 1px solid #e5e5e5; padding-top: 1rem; } nav.page-nav a { color: #0070f3; font-size: 0.9rem; text-decoration: none; } nav.page-nav a:hover { text-decoration: underline; } footer { border-top: 1px solid #e5e5e5; margin-top: 2rem; padding-top: 1rem; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #666; display: flex; gap: 1rem; } footer a { color: #666; } </style> </head> <body> <header> {{/* Breadcrumb navigation matches the JSON-LD BreadcrumbList emitted by {{template "forge:head" .Head}} via Doc.Head(). Both the visible navigation and the structured data are derived from forge.Crumbs(). */}} <a href="/docs">Forge Docs</a> <span>›</span> <a href="/docs">{{.Content.Section}}</a> <span>›</span> <span>{{.Content.Title}}</span> </header> <main> <span class="section-tag">{{.Content.Section}}</span> <h1>{{.Content.Title}}</h1> {{/* forge_markdown converts markdown to safe HTML. Supported: headings, bold, italic, inline code, fenced code blocks, links, ordered and unordered lists, paragraphs. Content is HTML-escaped before markdown processing — no XSS risk. */}} <div class="body">{{forge_markdown .Content.Body}}</div> <nav class="page-nav"> <a href="/docs">← All documentation</a> </nav> </main> <footer> <a href="/docs">Docs home</a> <a href="/llms.txt">llms.txt</a> <a href="/llms-full.txt">llms-full.txt</a> {{/* AIDoc link: machine-readable endpoint for this doc page. Returns plain text with title, URL, summary, and full markdown body. Enabled by forge.AIIndex(forge.AIDoc) on the module. Useful for AI assistants that need to fetch a single page without parsing HTML. */}} <a href="/docs/{{.Content.Slug}}/aidoc">AIDoc (machine-readable)</a> <a href="/sitemap.xml">Sitemap</a> </footer> </body> </html>
